Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0CDE "VENOMSTRIKESBACK-07D8-0CDE" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $07d8 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Venom Strikes Back.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $07D8 to turn off interrupts from the two CIA chips and ack any pending CIA interrupts to allow the game to start correctly. As the original did not have a loading screen, the one included was converted from the Spectrum version by DATA-LAND of Technische Maschinenfabrik (https://csdb.dk/scener/?id=4845).
